description: A full-width call-to-action banner with bold heading, supporting text, and prominent button. Designed to capture attention and drive conversions. Use between content sections for sign-ups, downloads, or contact. Layout: colored background with centered heading, description, and large contrasting button. Optional background image with overlay.
label: CTA Banner
